query: Add a user interaction profile to this blueprint project so the agent calibrates to me.
expected_behavior: Creates .agent-profile.md from the profile template, including the response-calibration default (conclusion-first, proportionate)
Adds .agent-profile.md to .gitignore so it stays out of version control
Asks the sample profile questions only to fill gaps it cannot infer
Records that the live conversation outranks the stored profile
Does not put personal calibration facts into AGENTS.md or AGENT_BLUEPRINT.md
